title: Advancement Overload
description: Adds a lot, I mean a lot, of advancement (90+) to make players want to adventure through their worlds. To collecting stacks of diamonds to traveling 10k blocks by elytra the datapack adds A LOT of advancement with their own rewards (For the hard ones)
body:
## Adds a lot, I mean a lot, of advancement (90+) to make players want to adventure through their worlds. To collecting stacks of diamonds to traveling 10k blocks by elytra the datapack adds A LOT of advancement with their own rewards (For the hard ones)
**If you've enjoyed this creation, you might also like this one:** Gradients Evolved
> Creator of Diamonds:
> Obtain Stacks (64) of Diamond Blocks [so 576 diamonds],
> Reward: 1-2 Netherite Upgrades,
> XP Reward: 15'000 xp

Wood Collector: >
> Obtain every wood type (Mangrove, Birch, Crimson, etc.),
> Reward: Chance to get 1-64 of any wood type,
> XP Reward: 100 xp

Is This What Flesh Tastes Like?:
> Eat rotten flesh,
> Reward: [NONE],
> XP Reward: 50 xp

> Fully Geared Up: >
> Get all netherite tools & armor (Doesn't include a hoe,since its too useless),
> Reward: Chance to get 1-3 Nether Stars, 10-32 Netherite Blocks, 1 Dragon Egg or 1-3 Elytras,
> XP Reward: 10'000 xp

And more!!!
